description: Test prompts for evaluating Action LoRA dynamic motion control

test_prompts.prompt: a 3d animated character, dynamic running action, forward motion, athletic stride, motion blur
a 3d animated character, jumping action pose, mid-air leap, energetic motion, dramatic lighting
a 3d animated character, waving gesture, hand raised, friendly action, cheerful motion
a 3d animated character, pointing gesture, extended arm, directional action, focused pose
a 3d animated character, throwing motion, athletic action, arm extended, dynamic pose
a 3d animated character, catching action, arms reaching, grabbing motion, focused expression
a 3d animated character, climbing motion, ascending action, hands gripping, active movement
a 3d animated character, dancing action, rhythmic movement, expressive motion, joyful energy

generation_params.negative_prompt: multiple people, static pose, blur, low quality, distorted, deformed
